import pandas as pd, ast
for ds in ['musique', '2wikimultihopqa']:
    df = pd.read_csv\(f'AdaRAGUE/data/adaptive_rag_{ds}/test.csv', nrows=3\)
    print\(f'=== {ds} columns:', df.columns.tolist\(\)\)
    row = df.iloc[0]
    print\('qid:', row['qid']\)
    print\('question_text:', row['question_text']\)
    print\('answer_objects:', str\(row['answer_objects']\)[:200]\)
    if 'type' in df.columns:
        print\('type:', row['type']\)
    print\(\)
